name: technique-triage
description: Review-only triage pass over candidate radar entries in .github/harness/memory/radar/. Classify each as adopted, parked, or rejected and record the decision in the entry's Decision Log. No code changes.
rubric: Every candidate entry has been read and classified (adopted / parked / rejected).
Each decision is recorded in the entry's Decision Log with date, rationale, and next step.
Adopted entries name a concrete follow-up task and target files/domains.
No code was written or changed — this loop is triage-only.
Entries that could not be classified have a note explaining what information is missing.
fixPrompt: For each .md file in .github/harness/memory/radar/ (excluding README.md and _template.md): read the entry, apply the adoption gate from the ai-techniques-radar skill, set status to adopted/parked/rejected, and append a row to its Decision Log. Do not implement anything.
guardrails: Do not write any code or edit any file outside .github/harness/memory/radar/.
Do not mark an entry as adopted unless all adoption gate criteria are met.
Do not merge two ideas into one file — one idea per file is required.
Triage decisions must be based on current harness problems, not generic enthusiasm.
onExhausted: Stop. List every candidate that could not be triaged and the missing information needed to complete triage.
